headline: Onsemi announces $7bn all-stock agreement to buy Synaptics
summary: Under the agreement, Synaptics shareholders will receive 1.350 shares of onsemi common stock for each Synaptics share they hold.

content.title: Onsemi announces $7bn all-stock agreement to buy Synaptics
content.summary: Under the agreement, Synaptics shareholders will receive 1.350 shares of onsemi common stock for each Synaptics share they hold.

thumbnail.caption: onsemi expects the deal to be accretive to non-GAAP EPS within 18 months of closing.

headline: This Week In AI Chips - Onsemi Expands Into Physical AI With Synaptics Acquisition
summary: onsemi has announced its agreement to acquire Synaptics for approximately $7 billion, signaling a significant expansion into "Physical AI" systems. This acquisition is part of onsemi's strategic initiative to enhance its capabilities by integrating Synaptics’ Edge AI compute solutions, which will help onsemi address broader end markets including automotive and industrial sectors. The transaction is expected to position onsemi at the intersection of power, sensing, connected computing, and...

headline: ON Semiconductor Joins ‘Edge AI’ Market With $7 Billion Acquisition. The Stock Falls.
summary: ON Semiconductor  has agreed to buy internet-of-things company  Synaptics  as it vies to bring artificial-intelligence from data centers into the physical world.  Synaptics  shareholders will receive 1.35 shares of  Onsemi  stock for each Synaptics share in the all-stock deal, representing an enterprise value of around $7 billion.  Onsemi stock dropped 14% to $102.35 in premarket trading Friday.

headline: ON Semiconductor Joins ‘Edge AI’ Market With $7 Billion Acquisition. The Stock Plummets.
summary: ON Semiconductor  agreed to buy internet-of-things company  Synaptics  as it vies to bring artificial-intelligence from data centers into the physical world.  Synaptics  shareholders will receive 1.35 shares of  Onsemi  stock for each Synaptics share in the all-stock deal, representing an enterprise value of around $7 billion.  Onsemi shares dropped 19% to $95.67 in early trading Friday, putting the stock on pace for its largest single-day decline since October 30, 2023.

headline: ON Semiconductor Tumbles 20%: Is It Dragging Down Semiconductor Names Like AMD and Intel?

headline: onsemi downgraded by TD Cowen after Synaptics deal clouds growth story
summary: Investing.com -- TD Cowen downgraded onsemi to Hold from Buy, arguing that the company's planned acquisition of Synaptics complicates its investment thesis despite maintaining confidence in its long-term automotive and datacenter growth prospects.
